name: Almond Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Stir in the ground almonds.
3. Gradually add the sifted flour, mixing until a dough forms.
4. Chill the dough for 1 hour.
5. Roll out small pieces of dough to about 1 inch in diameter.
6. Form the rolled dough into small logs.
7. Bake at 325°F for 20 minutes.
